design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism for the Creator Economy. A command-center feel mixing high-density data clarity with emotional, high-contrast visual tension.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mode B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for Dashboard. High density, structural clarity.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for all dense content, paragraphs, and tabular data. Optical alignment prioritized over geometric.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (border-white/10), no soft shadows. Sharp and structural.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_elements: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) on hover, border color darkens/brightens to border-white/30. Text color must be explicitly set on hover.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized to remove the default Vercel look. Use HTML/Tailwind for marketing hero.
components.buttons: Sharp corners or max 8px radius. High contrast. Primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/90. Secondary: border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10.
components.forms: Inputs with flat backgrounds, 1px border. Focus states must have higher contrast (ring-2 ring-white/30).
components.tables: Dense. border-collapse. Bottom borders on rows only. Hover states on rows.
components.charts: Recharts/Shadcn charts. Use primary_accent, secondary_accent, and data_blue for data series. No full-area gradients, use clean lines.

motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Accessibility first. High contrast focus rings.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Staggered entrance animations for dashboard lists using framer-motion.

hero_background.description: Energetic dark concert crowd for marketing hero section.

artist_profile_placeholder.description: Music producer in studio - use as default avatar or profile header background.

album_art_placeholder.description: Headphones on keyboard - placeholder for release cover art.

marketing_feature_1.description: Hands raised concert - use for the 'Distribution & Audience' feature section.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-release-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and high-contrast color palette.
Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk.
Do not use purple or teal. Rely on Signal Red (#FF3B30) and pure white/greys.
Use JetBrains Mono for all ISRC, UPC, financial figures, and royalty numbers.
Dashboard cards should not have soft shadows; use a 1px solid border with a flat background.
Implement the UI using Shadcn components but strip the default rounded soft look to match the 'Tactical Minimalism' geometry.
